_note: Cryptogram quotes. Mix of difficulty: many contain solver-friendly pattern words (THAT, BELIEVE, BETWEEN, PEOPLE, BECAUSE, WITHOUT, REMEMBER, etc.) and common short words (THE/AND/A/I/IS/OF). Some are harder with rare letters or no pattern gimmes. Apostrophes stay as plaintext in the encoded version, which signals contractions to solvers.
